data.title: Innovent Biologics gets FDA approval for Phase 3 study of IBI363 in lung cancer (MarsLight-11).
data.description: On August 24, 2025, Innovent Biologics, Inc. ("Innovent") announced its operations in SAN FRANCISCO and SUZHOU, China. Innovent, listed as HKEX: 01801, is dedicated to producing top-notch medicines in oncology, cardiovascular, and metabolic diseases.

data.title: $4.5 million raised for cardiac care in Ontario during CPKC Women's Open, with $4 million donation presented by CPKC.
data.description: In Mississauga, Ontario, the 2025 CPKC Women's Open event, held on August 24th, was a massive hit among attendees, with impressive performances and a strong turnout. The event successfully raised an unprecedented $4.5 million to support cardiac healthcare initiatives in the region. As a highlight, CPKC made a generous donation of $4 million towards this cause on the final day of the tournament.

data.title: China's former real estate giant, Evergrande, faces delisting from HKSE, carrying massive debt and numerous creditors.
data.description: On Monday, China Evergrande will face delisting from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange amid a substantial debt of approximately [specific amount] and a large number of creditors seeking repayment.

data.title: SK hynix mass produces 321-layer QLC NAND Flash; industry's highest density product; commercial launch in H1 next year.
data.description: The industry has successfully developed the most densely packed QLC product, with plans for a commercial release in the first half of next year after successful customer validation. The expansion of independent operation units, known as "planes," allows for the simultaneous handling of large capacities and high performance.

data.title: SpaceX postpones 10th Starship test; previous 3 flights faced issues. Elon Musk plans rescheduled launch.
data.description: Elon Musk's company has decided to postpone the upcoming journey of its Starship prototype due to challenges encountered in the previous three launch endeavors.

data.title: WeFi Technology Group is transforming channel finance amid growing tech investments, offering adaptive solutions for IT partners.
data.description: Amid a rise in technology investments worldwide, channel finance is undergoing a crucial transformation, presenting both substantial prospects and the necessity for advancement. The global IT sector remains a robust driver of economic expansion, showing resilience and dynamism. However, escalating deal intricacies, disjointed procedures, and outdated credit frameworks are driving the requirement for more flexible financial options to address the disparities between technology channel collaborators.

data.title: Pavel Durov criticizes French gov, says case stalled a year after 2024 arrest, lacks evidence. #Telegram #PavelDurov
data.description: In 2024, it has been a year since Durov's arrest, and according to him, French law enforcement authorities are still encountering difficulties in uncovering any proof of his wrongdoing.

data.title: Team Falcons wins Esports World Cup with record-breaking 750M viewers, 350M hours watched online, 3M visitors. Ronaldo presents trophy.
data.description: The world's largest multi-title esports tournament and festival attracted an impressive 750 million viewers and garnered 350 million hours watched online. Additionally, the event saw 3 million visitors in attendance. During the tournament, Cristiano Ronaldo presented the Club Championship Trophy to be handed over by HRH Prince Mohammed bin Salman to the victorious Team Falcons. The EWC made a prominent return to the scene, creating a buzz in the esports community.

data.title: Luca Netz discusses $Pengu's growth plans amid 2025 bull market, emphasizing trends in Web3 like tokenized stocks & brand partnerships.
data.description: CEO Luca Netz of Igloo Inc. shared insights on Pudgy Penguins' expansion plans and financial strategies in the thriving market of 2025. Netz highlighted the company's objectives to enhance its branding, boost business operations, and secure capital amidst the bullish market conditions. He also shed light on the emerging trends within Web3, such as the prominence of crypto treasury companies, the rise of tokenized stocks, and the renewed popularity of collaborations with major sporting entities and renowned brands.

data.title: Triple One Metals closes $500,000 funding with 40,816,327 shares on four-month hold.
data.description: A lock-up period of four months is imposed on 40,816,327 shares that have been issued.

data.title: X4 Pharma issues 11,015,650 inducement shares to Craig, Volpone, and Kirske under 2019 Inducement Plan.
data.description: X4 Pharmaceuticals announced inducement awards on August 12 and August 14, 2025, under the 2019 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. The awards on August 12 included options for 4,250,718 shares of X4's common stock each for Dr. Adam Craig and John Volpone, and 2,833,812 shares for David Kirske. On August 14, additional awards were given to the same individuals: Dr. Craig and Mr. Volpone received options for 529,201 shares each, while Mr. Kirske received options for 352,800 shares. These awards are aimed at improving the lives of individuals with rare immune system diseases.
